Title: SearchMemberInfo
Step Action: Log into the Windward application using test credentials
Step Expected Result: User is authenticated and lands on the home/dashboard page

Step Action: Navigate to Member Info search
Step Expected Result: Member Info search page loads with input fields visible

Step Action: Enter a valid Member ID or Member Last Name in the search field
Step Expected Result: Search criteria is accepted without error

Step Action: Click the Search button
Step Expected Result: Search executes without error or timeout

Step Action: Review the returned results list
Step Expected Result: At least one matching member record is returned with name and plan information visible

Step Action: Select a member record from the results
Step Expected Result: Member detail page loads displaying member demographics and enrollment details

Title: PeformClaimSearch
Step Action: Log into the Windward application using test credentials
Step Expected Result: User is authenticated and lands on the home/dashboard page

Step Action: Navigate to Claim Search
Step Expected Result: Claim search page loads with search input fields visible

Step Action: Enter a valid claim number or a date range in the search fields
Step Expected Result: Search criteria is accepted without error

Step Action: Apply at least one filter (e.g., Claim Status or Provider)
Step Expected Result: Filter is applied successfully

Step Action: Click Search
Step Expected Result: Search executes and results are returned

Step Action: Verify results list displays claim records with status, provider, and service date
Step Expected Result: Claim records are listed with claim number, status, provider, and service date visible

Title: NavigateToClaimAudit
Step Action: Log into the Windward application using test credentials
Step Expected Result: User is authenticated and lands on the home/dashboard page

Step Action: Navigate to Claims and open an existing claim record
Step Expected Result: Claim detail page loads successfully

Step Action: Locate and click the Claim Audit link or tab within the claim record
Step Expected Result: Claim Audit page or section loads without error

Step Action: Verify audit history entries are displayed
Step Expected Result: Audit trail shows timestamped entries with action descriptions and user information

Title: NavigateToSubGroupDrilldownDetails
Step Action: Log into the Windward application using test credentials
Step Expected Result: User is authenticated and lands on the home/dashboard page

Step Action: Navigate to Group Info and retrieve a group that has associated subgroups
Step Expected Result: Group detail page loads showing the subgroups list

Step Action: Click on a subgroup link to access drilldown details
Step Expected Result: SubGroup Drilldown Details page loads without error

Step Action: Verify subgroup detail information is displayed (name, ID, member count, plan details)
Step Expected Result: Subgroup name, ID, member count, and plan details are visible and accurate

Title: PeformFindAProviderSearch
Step Action: Log into the Windward application using test credentials
Step Expected Result: User is authenticated and lands on the home/dashboard page

Step Action: Navigate to Find A Provider
Step Expected Result: Find A Provider search page loads with location and specialty input fields visible

Step Action: Enter a valid zip code or city and select a dental specialty (e.g., General Dentistry)
Step Expected Result: Search criteria is accepted without error

Step Action: Click Search or Find
Step Expected Result: Search executes without error

Step Action: Verify in-network dental providers are returned within the specified area
Step Expected Result: Provider results are listed with name, address, distance, and network status

Step Action: Verify provider results can be filtered or sorted (e.g., by specialty or distance)
Step Expected Result: Results respond to filter/sort actions and list updates accordingly

Title: NavigateToCobEntryViewPageFromOperationsSidebar
Step Action: Log into the Windward application using test credentials
Step Expected Result: User is authenticated and lands on the home/dashboard page

Step Action: Locate the Operations sidebar or navigation menu
Step Expected Result: Operations menu is visible in the navigation

Step Action: Click on the COB (Coordination of Benefits) Entry View option in the Operations menu
Step Expected Result: COB Entry View page loads without error

Step Action: Verify the COB Entry View page displays required fields and the entry grid
Step Expected Result: Page shows claim/member search fields and entry grid with no error messages displayed

Title: NavigateToManualClaimEntryPageFromOperations
Step Action: Log into the Windward application using test credentials
Step Expected Result: User is authenticated and lands on the home/dashboard page

Step Action: Locate the Operations sidebar or navigation menu
Step Expected Result: Operations menu is visible in the navigation

Step Action: Click on the Manual Claim Entry option in the Operations menu
